'''thachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zymographically|zymographically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zymographically|zymographically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thachate|thachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thachatesher|thachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thachatesherĂ«m|thachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thachatero|thachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thachateshĂ«|thachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thachateshĂ«m|thachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithachatero|gokithachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithachateshĂ«|gokithachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithachateshĂ«m|gokithachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothachankerom|gothachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothachankeshĂ«|gothachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothachankeshĂ«m|gothachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothachankeya|gothachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thachaterom|thachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thachatemu|thachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thachateya|thachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithachaterom|gokithachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithachatemu|gokithachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithachateya|gokithachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thachachate|thachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thachachatesher|thachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thachachatesherĂ«m|thachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thachachatero|thachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thachachateshĂ«|thachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thachachateshĂ«m|thachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithachachatero|gokithachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithachachateshĂ«|gokithachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithachachateshĂ«m|gokithachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothachachankerom|gothachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothachachankeshĂ«|gothachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothachachankeshĂ«m|gothachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothachachankeya|gothachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thachachaterom|thachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thachachatemu|thachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thachachateya|thachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithachachaterom|gokithachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithachachatemu|gokithachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithachachateya|gokithachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠchĂŠte|thĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠchĂŠtesher|thĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠchĂŠtero|thĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠchĂŠtero|gokithĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠchĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠchĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠchĂŠterom|thĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠchĂŠtemu|thĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠchĂŠteya|thĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠchĂŠterom|gokithĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠchĂŠteya|gokithĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafchafte|thafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafchaftesher|thafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafchaftesherĂ«m|thafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafchaftero|thafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafchafteshĂ«|thafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafchafteshĂ«m|thafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafchaftero|gokithafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafchafteshĂ«|gokithafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafchafteshĂ«m|gokithafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafchafnkerom|gothafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafchafnkeshĂ«|gothafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafchafnkeshĂ«m|gothafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafchafnkeya|gothafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafchafterom|thafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafchaftemu|thafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafchafteya|thafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafchafterom|gokithafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafchaftemu|gokithafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafchafteya|gokithafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
